en_title: Xbox Game Pass Soldiers on With June 2026 Wave 2 Lineup Announcement
cn_title: Xbox Game Pass 6月第二波阵容公布，裁员阴云不散
subtitle: 内忧外患的更新
opus_summary: 微软公布XGP6月第二波游戏，但传闻工作室关闭裁员，Sharma称利润率仅3%，五年投超200亿美元(约合人民币1354亿元)收入反降，纳德拉急推可持续盈利。裁员预计6月底。

paragraphs.en: Amid reports of potential studio closures and mass layoffs, Microsoft has announced the Xbox Game Pass June 2026 Wave 2 lineup of games. It has yet to comment, however, on this week’s rumors that the likes of Hellblade developer Ninja Theory, Psychonauts developer Double Fine, and South of Midnight developer Compulsion may shut down .
paragraphs.cn: 在有报道称多家工作室可能关闭、大规模裁员即将到来之际，微软公布了Xbox Game Pass 2026年6月第二波游戏阵容。不过，微软尚未就本周的传言置评，传闻称《地狱之刃》开发商Ninja Theory、《意航员》开发商Double Fine以及《午夜之南》开发商Compulsion等工作室可能会被关闭。

paragraphs.en: As revealed on Xbox Wire , coming to Xbox Game Pass during the second half of June and the early part of July are EA Sports FC 26, which is of course timed to coincide with the ongoing World Cup, RV There Yet?, and Winds of Arcana: Ruination. Meanwhile, 2021 Call of Duty game Vanguard hits Game Pass this month. There are no day one releases for the rest of June, with Junkster releasing today, June 16.
paragraphs.cn: 据Xbox Wire公布，6月下半月至7月初加入Xbox Game Pass的游戏包括《EA Sports FC 26》（当然是为了配合正在进行的世界杯）、《RV There Yet?》和《Winds of Arcana: Ruination》。同时，2021年的《使命召唤：先锋》将于本月入库。6月剩余时间没有其他首日首发作品，而《Junkster》在今天（6月16日）发布。

paragraphs.en: Game Pass soldiers on amid new Xbox boss Asha Sharma’s “reset” of the gaming business, which looks like it will result in a number of high-profile casualties. Yesterday, The Game Business reported that Xbox Game Studios boss Craig Duncan had stepped down, and news of various Microsoft studios potentially closing down emerged soon after. IGN has asked Microsoft for comment but it is yet to respond. Double Fine, however, did issue a single emoji social media post , summing up how it feels right now.
paragraphs.cn: 在新任Xbox负责人Asha Sharma对游戏业务进行「重置」的背景下，Game Pass仍在勉力前行，而这场重置似乎将导致一批知名工作室成为牺牲品。昨天，媒体《The Game Business》报道称Xbox Game Studios主管Craig Duncan已离职，随后多家微软工作室可能关闭的消息也很快传出。IGN已联系微软置评，但尚未收到回复。不过，Double Fine在社交媒体上发了一个只有表情符号的帖子，算是总结了当下的感受。

paragraphs.en: According to Bloomberg , Compulsion, Ninja Theory, and Double Fine aren’t the only Microsoft studios currently negotiating with Xbox to try to avoid closure, either. There is the potential for some or all to buy their way to independence, although that would likely come alongside layoffs, too.
paragraphs.cn: 据彭博社报道，Compulsion、Ninja Theory和Double Fine并非唯一正在与Xbox进行谈判、试图避免关闭的微软工作室。部分或全部工作室有可能自掏腰包买回独立，不过这往往也会伴随着裁员。

paragraphs.en: Following Sharma’s "reset" warning, "the studios most exposed are brilliant for prestige and rotten for the spreadsheet." Microsoft was then said to be speeding up development on new The Elder Scrolls, Fallout, and Halo games as it considered restructuring or even spinning off its gaming branch.
paragraphs.cn: 在Sharma发出「重置」警告后，「最岌岌可危的工作室是那些口碑辉煌、但在报表上表现糟糕的」。随后有消息称，微软正在加速开发新的《上古卷轴》《辐射》和《光环》游戏，同时考虑重组甚至拆分其游戏业务。

paragraphs.en: Sharma's ground-shaking memo revealed that Microsoft's gaming business currently has a 3% accountability margin (assumed to mean profit margin), which is down year-on-year. "Excluding Activision Blizzard King, over the past five years, we have spent over $20 billion on ongoing investments in our content, platform, and hardware subsidy, but our annual revenue has declined nearly half a billion during that time. Going forward, this cannot continue," Sharma said.
paragraphs.cn: Sharma那份震动业界的备忘录透露，微软游戏业务目前的问责利润率（据信指净利润率）为3%，同比下降。「如果不计入动视暴雪，过去五年里，我们在内容、平台和硬件补贴上持续投入了超过200亿美元(约合人民币1354亿元)，但同期我们的年收入却下降了近5亿美元(约合人民币34亿元)。今后，这种情况不能再继续下去了。」Sharma说道。

paragraphs.en: Following the release of the memo, Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella said "there's more monetization of Xbox games happening on YouTube" than at Xbox , adding that the Xbox team needed to figure out how to "innovate both in hardware, as well as in the games, going forward in an economically viable way."
paragraphs.cn: 在这份内部备忘录曝光后，微软CEO Satya Nadella表示，「目前在YouTube上发生的Xbox游戏变现规模甚至超过了Xbox自身」，并补充说Xbox团队需要想办法「在硬件和游戏两方面同时进行创新，以经济上可持续的方式继续前进。」

paragraphs.en: "No one can accuse Microsoft of not having invested for the last 25 years," Nadella added. "Now, we have to turn this into a sustainable business that delivers what is fundamentally one of the best sources of entertainment, still."
paragraphs.cn: Nadella还说道：「没人能指责微软在过去25年里没有投入。现在，我们必须把它变成一个可持续的业务，持续提供这本质上仍是最好娱乐来源之一的东西。」

paragraphs.en: New Xbox chief strategy officer Matthew Ball recently said Game Pass lost "millions of subscribers" after Microsoft increased prices by 50% in October 2025. One of the first strategy changes Sharma brought in was a price cut .
paragraphs.cn: 新任Xbox首席战略官Matthew Ball近期表示，在微软于2025年10月提价50% 之后，Game Pass流失了「数百万用户」。Sharma上任后推动的首项策略调整之一就是降价。

paragraphs.en: This week’s grim news marks a significant U-turn on Xbox brand sentiment, after Sharma had started to turn core fans around with a number of crowd-pleasing changes such as the decision to make The Coalition's Gears of War: E-Day and inXile's Clockworld Revolution console exclusives. The Xbox layoffs are expected to come into effect at the end of Microsoft's financial year on June 30.
paragraphs.cn: 本周的这些严峻消息标志着Xbox品牌情绪的显著逆转，此前Sharma刚刚通过一系列讨好核心粉丝的举措开始赢回他们的好感，例如决定让The Coalition的《战争机器：事变日》和inXile的《Clockworld Revolution》成为主机独占作品。Xbox的裁员预计将在微软2026财年结束的6月30日生效。

paragraphs.en: As usual, a number of games are set to leave Game Pass this month.
paragraphs.cn: 和往常一样，本月又将有一批游戏离开Game Pass。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN的新闻总监。你可以在Twitter关注他 @wyp100，或通过邮件wesley_yinpoole@ign.com和私密邮箱wyp100@proton.me联系他。
